text_block_list.text:
On our way home from the Japan Cup, Mihono
Bourbon speaks up after a long bout of silence.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I would like to run in even bigger races.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It may shock you, but my reasoning is emotional.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have learned many emotions during the Twinkle
Series, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The one that I felt today was the deepest and
most striking.
She closes her eyes, as if recalling the feeling.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It was a warm, exhilarating sensation that welled
up from the depths of my heart—I believe it was
"pride."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe it was due to the size of the venue and
the heated competition I faced from Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the more powerful my
competition, the more "emotions" I will be able
to...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, there is more to be gained from racing than
that.
She seems unsure, yet confident at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This concept, it makes me "happy." This is why I
want to run in bigger races.

For better or worse, Mihono Bourbon isn't the
type to assert herself.

With the exception of aiming for her long-held
dream of winning the Classic Triple Crown, she's
pretty much only followed orders.

Now she's thinking for herself and boldly stating
that she wants to run in bigger races!
choice_data_list: (This makes me so happy for her!)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Please respond.
choice_data_list:
Let's do it! Let's make our next race an even
bigger one!

text_block_list.text: Hearing this, Mihono Bourbon nods happily.

Rice Shower is waiting for us in front of the
dormitory when we get back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon! Good job at the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I went to cheer you on from the stands
when I heard you would be running against Teio.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Thank you very much. That makes
me "happy."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No... I should be the one thanking you. Seeing
you race inspired me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I noticed something while I was watching. It's like
something in you has changed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, I realized this too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So it's true, then... I had a feeling that was the
case. I'm happy for you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, actually...
Rice Shower's expression turns serious.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't waiting here just to tell you that.
Actually... I wanted to tell you that I'm planning
to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's a huge race that McQueen and Teio will be
running in as well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So, um... If you don't mind, could you challenge
me again there?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We've both improved ourselves since the last
time we raced, so I want to race you again as I am
now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: No, it's not just you I want to pit myself against...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to race against the new-and-improved
versions of Teio, McQueen, and everyone on a
big stage!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It'll be such an exciting race! I just know it!

The Rice Shower who stands before us smiling so
brightly looks like an entirely different person
than before. Her usual timidity is nowhere to be
found.

It seems like she has grown a lot over the course
of the Twinkle Series.
And so has Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen, Tokai Teio, and Rice Shower...

Her eyes glitter with excitement for what awaits
her in the future.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I wish to run in the Arima Kinen.

We decide that our next target is the Arima
Kinen, a G1 race where only the best runners
gather!
